creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Yuri,

Given this package was last updated 2012, does it, or has it been confirmed to support Python 3? If not, please confirm successful run-time functionality with Python 3, either manually or with a test suite if provided, or limit it to 2.x versions (confirming with relevant upstream notes/docs if it exists)

Also, consider whether graphics/ may be a more specific and/or suitable category, as we try to minimise (where possible, by default) port additions to devel and misc
